title: WIP: rough style modulation idea with smoke test
author: jxning0422-dev

data.description: Adds a lightweight pathway that summarizes recent context so the model can adapt to shifting local statistics and operate in different text modes.
Auxiliary frequency-domain loss to encourage better modeling of medium-scale sequence structure and longer-span patterns.
Mechanisms for emphasizing nearby dependencies and carrying compact summaries across layers to reuse local context more efficiently.
Gating used in style variants, reported as consistently beneficial and especially effective in newer dual-style summary variants.
Simple FiLM-style modulation used as an earlier style variant and reported as the best among the earlier style approaches.

novel_contributions: Style modulation via a lightweight recent-context summary
Frequency-domain auxiliary loss for medium-scale sequence structure
Local memory mechanisms for nearby dependency reuse
FiLM-style modulation as a baseline style variant
